nasb.text: Then Saul said to David, “Blessed are you, my son David; you will both accomplish much and surely prevail.” So David went on his way, and Saul returned to his place.

esv.text: Then Saul said to David, “Blessed be you, my son David! You will do many things and will succeed in them.” So David went his way, and Saul returned to his place.

cnv.text: 掃羅對大衛說：“我兒大衛啊，願你得福，你必作成你所要作的，也必得勝。”於是大衛離去了，掃羅也回自己的地方去了。

ccb.text: 扫罗对大卫说：“我儿大卫，愿你蒙福。你一定能建功立业，战胜仇敌。”于是，大卫起身离开，扫罗也回家去了。
